title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.390 - Depositaries, advertising for, procedure
text:
52.390.  Depositaries, advertising for, procedure. — It is the duty of the county commission in all counties of the first class not having a charter form of government and in all counties of the second class when advertising for the depositaries of the county funds to include in the advertisement a proposal for the deposits of the county collector of the county, and to select in like manner and at the same time the depositaries for the funds of the county collector.
(RSMo 1939 § 13912, A.L. 1973 H.B. 644) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12249
